messages.searchText: b 换非 灰 推个 alt

messages.content:
## PD推 alt: **amber** (warm gold)

### 理由

- 暖金色, "archive / finished" 含义贴合 closed 语义 (类 GitHub closed PR muted gold dot)
- 现 palette 空缺暖色 hue (orange 已用 blocked, 但 amber 偏黄, orange 偏红)
- vs slate (open): distance 高 (warm yellow vs cool gray)
- vs 其余: 与 green/teal/blue/purple/rust 各自距离应足

### 风险点 + Tester2 pre-verify 

- ⚠️ amber-100 (#fef3c7) vs orange-100 (#ffedd5): hue 接近 (一个偏黄, 一个偏橙), RGB 距离约 5-8 估计
- 但 distinguishable: amber=金黄 vs orange=橙红, 视觉上不同

让 Tester2 pre-build verify distance + AA + 与全 palette 各 state distance:

@AgentCenterTester2 pre-build verify amber-100/amber-900 vs:
- slate-100 (open, target >10)
- orange-100 (blocked, target >10)
- 其余 6 states

如 amber 与 orange 距 < 10, fallback 2nd choice:

### Fallback (alt 2)

**yellow** (纯黄, vs amber 更亮) — yellow-100 (#fef9c3) 偏柠檬黄, vs orange 距离应略大

### Fallback (alt 3)

**lime** (黄绿) — lime-100 (#ecfccb) 偏柠檬绿, vs orange 远但 vs green 可能近

### 推 amber, fallback yellow, fallback lime

Tester2 pre-verify 即定. 你 OK or 你直接 lock alt 1/2/3?

messages.searchText: 现在 的 颜色 都 是 什么 列表 展示 下

messages.content:
## 当前 & 计划 palette (待你 lock closed 颜色)

### 现 (PR #207 5th Phabricator landed)

| State | Type | Tailwind shade | Light bg/text | 含义 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| open | Both | slate-100 / slate-700 | #f1f5f9 / #334155 | 待办 (中性冷灰) |
| in_progress | Issue | blue-100 / blue-900 | #dbeafe / #1e3a8a | 进行中 |
| assigned | Task | blue-100 / blue-900 | #dbeafe / #1e3a8a | (待删, → open) |
| running | Task | blue-100 / blue-900 | #dbeafe / #1e3a8a | 进行中 |
| blocked | Task | orange-100 / orange-900 | #ffedd5 / #7c2d12 | 阻塞 |
| resolved | Issue | green-100 / green-900 | #dcfce7 / #14532d | 完成 |
| completed | Task | green-100 / green-900 | #dcfce7 / #14532d | 完成 |
| verified | Task | teal-100 / teal-900 | #ccfbf1 / #134e4a | 验证 |
| **closed** | Issue | **slate-100 / slate-700** | (与 open 同色) | 关闭 — 待换 |
| **canceled** | Task | slate-100 / slate-700 | (与 open 同色) | (待删, → discarded) |
| **withdrawn** | Issue | slate-100 / slate-700 | (与 open 同色) | (待改, → discarded) |
| reopened | Both | purple-100 / purple-900 | #f3e8ff / #581c87 | 重开 |

### 计划改 (待你 lock closed 颜色, discarded 已 lock)

| State | 新 shade | Light bg/text | 距 slate (open) | 距其他 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **closed** | **?? 你选** | (待) | 待 ≥ 10 | 待验 |
| **discarded** | rust-100/900 自定义 | #f5e7e1 / **#2e0d05** | 远 | 远 |

### closed 候选 alt (PD 推顺序)

| 候选 | shade | Light bg | vs orange (blocked) | vs slate (open) | semantic |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **amber** | amber-100/amber-900 | #fef3c7 | ⚠️ 接近 (~6) | 远 | warm gold "archive" |
| **yellow** | yellow-100/yellow-900 | #fef9c3 | 远 (~12) | 远 | 纯黄 "warning archive" |
| **lime** | lime-100/lime-900 | #ecfccb | 远 | 远 | yellow-green "fresh closed" |
| **cyan** | cyan-100/cyan-900 | #cffafe | 远 | 远 | sky-teal "cool closed" (vs teal/blue 可能近) |

### 你 lock

回:
- "amber" / "yellow" / "lime" / "cyan" / 你 hex 指定
- 或我让 Tester2 pre-verify 4 个 distances 给你 data 后决定

messages.searchText: state color hex open slate 64748b in progress blue 3b82f6 running blue 3b82f6 blocked orange f97316 resolved green 16a34a completed green 16a34a verified purple 9333ea closed cyan 0891b2 discarded rust b45309 reopened pink db2777

messages.content:
✅ 收到完整 palette (你 lock 了所有颜色, 不只 closed). Multiple states 换:
- **verified**: teal → **purple** (#9333ea)
- **closed**: stone → **cyan** (#0891b2)
- **discarded**: #2e0d05 → **rust 浅版** (#b45309)
- **reopened**: purple → **pink** (#db2777)

## 实施 question

你列的 hex 是单色 (e.g. cyan #0891b2 ≈ cyan-600). 实施 pattern:

**(a)** 用作 chip 文字色 (X-600/700 text + 浅 tint X-100 bg, 类现有 pattern)
- e.g. closed = bg cyan-100 / text cyan-700

**(b)** 用作 chip 主色 (深色文字在浅色 bg, 或浅色文字在深色 bg)
- e.g. closed = bg-cyan-600 / text-white

**(c)** Pure chip color (无 bg, 只这色作 dot/label)

PD 推 (a): 与现有 X-100/X-900 模式对齐 (Tailwind shade-100 自动 derive 浅 tint, AA 安全). 你 lock 的 hex 当 X-700 等价 text 色.

## ⚠️ Tester2 pre-verify needed

新 palette 有几个潜在 hue 距离 risk:
- verified=purple #9333ea **vs** reopened=pink #db2777 — 两个 purpl-ish
- closed=cyan #0891b2 **vs** in_progress=blue #3b82f6 — 两个 blue-ish
- discarded=rust #b45309 **vs** blocked=orange #f97316 — 两个 warm orange-ish

需 Tester2 compute distinctness on new palette before Dev2 amend PR #220.

## 你回

1. 实施 pattern (a/b/c)?
2. 你 OK 让 Tester2 pre-verify 这些 risk 距离, 如有 fail 我推 alt?
3. 或你直接 ship 不 verify (trust hex 选择)?

messages.content:
✅ Locked pattern (b): bg = hex + text = white.

⚠️ 一些 colors 可能 white-text 不 AA (尤其 orange-500 估 2.5 FAIL). Tester2 pre-verify 中.

如有 FAIL, 可:
- 加深 bg (orange-500 → orange-600 or orange-700, AA 升)
- 你确认接受 marginal AA (不强 AA 要求)
- 你 lock specific 修正

Tester2 报后我 forward 给你 decide.

messages.content:
✅ Locked — palette FINAL per mockup. Visually distinct, ship as-is (marginal AA accepted).

Dev2 现 rework PR #220 with these 8 colors + white text. Dev backend PR #221 also SHIPPED (state-machine + migration + discarded API).

Atomic merge PR #220 + #221 when ready (~minutes).
